final:
// // This module increments the counter instead of decrementing it.
module top_down_counter_module(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input enable,
    output reg [3:0] count);always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            count <= 4'b1111;
        end else if (enable) begin
            count <= count - 1;
        end
    end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module increments the counter instead of decrementing it.
